description: An access control issue in Ecowitt GW1100 Series Weather Stations <=GW1100B_v2.1.5 allows unauthenticated attackers to access sensitive information including device and local WiFi passwords.
Claude Reasoning: Ecowitt GW1100 is a consumer home weather station / sensor gateway, not an irrigation controller or robot mower. It is plausibly residential home IoT, but it falls outside this category's stated in-scope device types and would sit more naturally under home sensors.
